Program Fees

Master’s Degree

MENU

IMPORTANT INFORMATION

The tuition amounts listed in the table represent the

annual tuition fees for the 2025–2026 academic year

. To benefit from special discounts, applicants are encouraged to complete the pre-application form provided below.

Non-thesis Master's programs have a total tuition equivalent to 1.5 years. Students are required to pay one full year of tuition at the 2025–2026 annual fee and an additional half-year of tuition at the fee that will be announced for the 2026–2027 academic year.

For

distance education programs

, the announced tuition fee for 2025–2026 covers the

total program cost

, and there is

no annual fee structure

.

For

thesis-based Master’s programs

, the total program tuition corresponds to

two years

. Students will complete the first-year tuition by paying one full year at the 2025–2026 annual fee and a second full year at the annual fee to be announced for 2026–2027. In thesis programs, tuition obligations are limited to two years,

regardless of the student’s actual time to graduation

.

Important Note:

Students who initially enrolled in the

Spring semester of the 2024–2025 academic year

and are currently continuing their Master’s studies must pay the second-year tuition fee

before the start of the upcoming Spring semester

. Students who complete their second-year tuition payment

by the evening of 28 November 2025

will be eligible for an

early payment discount

.

For payment procedures, students should contact the Financial Affairs Department:

Selda Tiryaki:

selda.tiryaki@okan.edu.tr

(1333)

Ezgi Gündüz:
